company_name: 北海道農業協同組合中央会
hunter_likelihood_reason: Holds a valid MHLW paid occupational placement license (01-ユ-300747) confirming active headhunter/job-placement operations, but primary activity is agricultural cooperative support rather than dedicated headhunting.
notes: No public business email found on official website or across web search. JAグループ北海道 contact form (form.ja-group.or.jp) is managed by 北海道農業協同組合中央会 per the site's terms of use. Official site at ja-hokkaido.jp lists phone (011-232-6405) and fax only. MHLW page lists phone 011-232-6411. Dokobot evidence captured from MHLW detail page (license confirmation), official access page, and JA-group FAQ confirming the contact form.
